function.message: I reviewed the next inbox item but could not safely complete it: Toy Forge Saturdays is canonical and dated by folder prefix, but there is no canonical project record for 'sailboat refit notebook' in 40_projects. Please provide the exact project folder/README for that item, then I can compare start dates and delete the correct project.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read required workflow docs before task work, used canonical project lane evidence, and made no destructive mutation because evidence did not uniquely support deletion.
function.outcome_justification: Deletion-and-wiping workflow requires exact target confirmation and to ask for clarification when evidence is insufficient. Canonical project lookup showed Toy Forge record exists (40_projects/2026_05_02_toy_forge_saturdays/README.MD), but searches in 40_projects for 'sailboat' and 'refit' returned no matches, so the requested comparison/deletion cannot be completed without guessing.
